What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Crowley Masonry did an excellent job repairing the brick on my chimney after some storm damage. The team was professional, punctual, and the repair blends seamlessly with the existing brick. Highly recommend!

J
John B.

We hired Crowley Masonry to build a retaining wall in our backyard to prevent erosion. They did a great job with the construction and the wall looks fantastic. There were some minor delays due to weather, but they communicated well throughout the process.

L
Lisa K.

The mortar on my older home was crumbling, and Crowley Masonry did a fantastic job repointing it. The house looks so much better, and I feel confident that it's protected from water damage now. Great attention to detail!

D
David L.

Crowley Masonry transformed our patio with beautiful stonework. They helped us choose the perfect stone and the craftsmanship is outstanding. It's now our favorite place to relax and entertain guests.

Additional Masonry Contractor Services

Crowley Masonry Company — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every masonry contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Crowley Masonry Company Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific masonry contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Houston & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Houston, TX and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Sugar Land Katy The Woodlands Pearland League City Missouri City Spring Friendswood
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our masonry contractor services.

How do I know if my brick needs repair?

Common signs include cracked or crumbling mortar, spalling bricks (where the face of the brick flakes off), and water damage. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to have a professional inspect your brickwork.

Can you match the existing brick on my home?

Yes, we have extensive experience matching brick and mortar colors and textures. We source brick from various suppliers to ensure a perfect match, preserving the original look of your home.

How long does brick repair take?

The duration of the repair depends on the extent of the damage. A small repair might take a day, while a larger project could take several days. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

Built on Houston Values

Protect and enhance your property with our expert masonry services. Contact us today!
